steps.title: Close the first clause
steps.content: The first independent clause lists where Švarbová exhibited her work and uses respectively to match galleries with countries. The next words begin another independent clause about her photographs.

steps.title: Separate the clauses
steps.content: Choice A leaves the clauses joined by only a comma. Choice C puts the semicolon before respectively, separating the adverb from what it modifies. Choice D creates a run-on. A comma before respectively and a semicolon after it fit the structure. The answer is B.
